choices.label: L'Orfeo by Claudio Monteverdi, one of the first works recognized as an opera, receives its première performance.
The last battle of the Cudgel War takes place on the Santavuori Hill in Ilmajoki, Ostrobothnia.

events_used.text: L'Orfeo by Claudio Monteverdi, one of the first works recognized as an opera, receives its première performance.
The last battle of the Cudgel War takes place on the Santavuori Hill in Ilmajoki, Ostrobothnia.
